title: EQ - X button, close the screen
scenario: EQ screen close button (X) in upper right corner returns to Device Settings screen on tap
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
3. On the Device Settings screen, tap on Audio Settings.
4. On the Audio Settings screen, tap on Equalizer.
5. Observe the Equalizer (EQ) screen for an X (close) button in the upper right corner.
expected: The EQ screen closes and the user is returned to the Device Settings screen.
